meta_title: Pricing | My Private Clinic — Private GP in Fulwood, Preston
meta_description: Transparent pricing for private GP consultations in Fulwood, Preston. No hidden fees. Prescription and referral letters included in every appointment.
hero_sub: We believe you should know exactly what you're paying before you book. No surprises, no administration charges, no extras you didn't ask for.
included_intro: Every appointment at My Private Clinic is priced simply. The fee you see is the fee you pay — including things other clinics charge extra for.

included_cards.title: Prescription Writing Included
included_cards.text: If the doctor decides you need medication, the prescription is written as part of your appointment fee. Take it to any UK pharmacy and pay only the dispensing cost.

included_cards.title: Referral Letters Included
included_cards.text: If you need referring to a specialist, the referral letter is written as part of your appointment at no extra charge. No follow-up visit needed.

included_cards.title: No Registration or Joining Fee
included_cards.text: There is no registration fee or admin charge. Just book an appointment and come in.

gp_rows.label: Adult — 60 min
gp_rows.note: Health checks, complex or multiple concerns
